docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-13-2019 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-13-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-13-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. REPRESENTED ALEJANDRA CHANQUIN, COLLECTIONS AGENT IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CARLOS RAMIREZ IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RAMIREZ, CARLOS $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,600.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $50.00) SERVED JUL-08-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT RAMIREZ, CARLOS
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO CONTRA COSTA COUNTY FILED BY ASSIGNEE JEFFERSON CAPITAL SYSTEMS, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT RAMIREZ, CARLOS
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $1,084.16 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT RAMIREZ, CARLOS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT RAMIREZ, CARLOS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-13-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) REPRESENTATIVE ALEJANDRA CHANQUIN, COLLECTIONS AGENT (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.
JUDGMENT ASSIGNED BY JUDGMENT CREDITOR OPORTUN INC. ASSIGNED TO JEFFERSON CAPITAL SYSTEMS, LLC
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO CONTRA COSTA COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $3,724.16 AS TO DEFENDANT RAMIREZ, CARLOS
